name: presentation-skill
summary: Source-first PowerPoint/PPTX generation skill for Codex, ChatGPT, and OpenAI-style agents.
one_line: Write outline.json, build editable .pptx decks with scripts, and run layout QA before delivery.
primary_audience: people who need reproducible lab, clinical, investor, board, or report decks
trigger_phrases: run layout QA on this deck
turn this CSV or Excel file into slides
capabilities: workspace mode with design_brief.json, content_plan.json, evidence_plan.json, asset_plan.json, outline.json, and notes.md
descriptor-only style corpus and atom routing
chart, table, figure, lab-run-results, scientific-figure, KPI, comparison, matrix, timeline, and Mermaid flow slides
generated data artifact scaffolding from local tabular data
geometry, visual, readability, placeholder, and reproducibility QA

default_commands.workspace_init: python3 scripts/init_deck_workspace.py --workspace decks/my-deck --title "My Deck Title" --style-preset executive-clinical

do_not_use_for: pure text brainstorming with no deck artifact
mutating a generated PPTX when source workspace files exist
shipping a deliverable deck without QA
